purpose: Govern source-of-truth files, schemas, write boundaries, and persistent path rules for Meta-Runtime-Memory.
instruction: JSON snapshots are the durable source of truth.
Markdown files are derived mirrors and must be regenerated from JSON.
User memory and task memory use separate schemas and separate files.
Session memory, active runtime, turn audit, and watcher state use separate governed JSON files.
Every persisted write must pass validation before the file is updated.
workflow: Merge only the minimal necessary patch.
Render the matching Markdown mirror when the target owns one.
rules: Do not write mutable memory into the skill root.
Do not accept unknown top-level keys silently.
Lists represent curated stable signal, not raw accumulation.
Turn-start and turn-end claims are invalid without session_id + turn_id audit files.
Prefer replacing stale snapshot truth over appending contradictory notes.
